title: Planet Labs (PL) Stock Gains Ground on Robust Defense Contracts and Satellite AI Breakthrough
text:
Planet Labs stock gains ground as robust defense contract wins combine with breakthrough artificial intelligence capabilities deployed on satellites. The company's fiscal 2026 results and recent technical achievements position it as a leader in next-generation space intelligence.

The NVIDIA partnership represents a transformative technology shift, with in-orbit AI inference demonstrated on Pelican-4 achieving 80% accuracy on object detection tasks. This breakthrough enables real-time intelligence generation at the source, reducing latency and bandwidth requirements for customers requiring immediate insights. Ground-based GPU acceleration and generative AI super-resolution further enhance the value proposition.

Major defense contracts validate strong government demand. Sweden's Armed Forces commitment represents a multi-year, low nine-figure agreement, while Germany's €240 million contract demonstrates European defense sector confidence. These contracts reflect the critical role satellite intelligence plays in modern defense operations and geospatial awareness.

Planet Labs' financial performance supports continued innovation. Fiscal 2026 revenue of $307.7 million (26% growth), adjusted EBITDA of $15.5 million profitability, and free cash flow of $52.9 million provide capital for satellite deployment and AI development. The $900 million backlog ensures revenue visibility while the company scales satellite constellation to 32 spacecraft.

Analyst consensus maintains Buy ratings with average price targets around $35. The combination of robust defense contracts, technological breakthrough in AI processing, and improving profitability creates multiple growth drivers. Fiscal 2027 guidance of $415-440 million revenue (35-43% growth) reflects confidence that these trends will continue.
